title: Uranium Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Math bug in forked Uniswap v2 code leading to liquidity drain

prevention.rule: Block any tx that deploys or interacts with contracts with known vulnerable code patterns.
prevention.trigger: DEPLOY_CONTRACT -> contains known vulnerable code patterns

red_flags: Uniswap v2 code fork with minor changes
summary: A math bug in the UraniumPair contract, a fork of Uniswap v2, allowed attackers to drain liquidity. A guard could have blocked deployments or interactions with known vulnerable code patterns.
